heading: Method of payment; installments; advances or reimbursement; adjustments
label: 4771 Method of payment; installments; advances or reimbursement; adjustments
text: Payments under this chapter may be made in installments, and in advance or by way of reimbursement, as the Office may determine, with necessary adjustments on account of overpayments or underpayments.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, means the provisions of subchapters I, II, III, and IV of this chapter. See .section 4761 of this title

Transfer of Functions“Office”, meaning Office of Personnel Management, substituted in text for “Commission”, meaning Civil Service Commission, pursuant to Reorg.
